summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Personal Finance Tracker. Successfully tested Hebrew calendar functionality, distribution mode changes, Zod validation, and critical UNMOUNTING behavior in give_only mode. Found minor session management and Hebrew calendar edge case issues.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: User sessions expire frequently during testing, requiring re-login

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Unknown 5786' for some Hebrew months during navigation

passed_tests: Add Transaction modal opens and displays correctly
Zod validation working for description and amount fields
Hebrew calendar toggle switches between Gregorian and Hebrew modes perfectly
Hebrew date display shows correct Hebrew dates (e.g., '23rd of Nisan, 5786')
Monthly view navigation (prev/next month) works in both calendar modes
Settings dropdown opens and closes properly
Distribution mode can be changed from 'both' to 'give_only'
CRITICAL: Total Owed card is properly UNMOUNTED in give_only mode (not just hidden)
CRITICAL: Average card is also UNMOUNTED in give_only mode
Add Transaction modal in give_only mode hides lend percentage inputs
Transaction submission works and updates dashboard stats correctly
Currency normalization setup present (exchange rate field appears for non-base currencies)
Transaction appears in transaction list after submission
Dashboard stats update correctly with currency normalization
Percentage validation error appears when give + lend > 100%
Submit button is disabled when percentage validation fails
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Investigate session management - users get logged out frequently during normal usage. 2) Fix Hebrew calendar edge case where some months show 'Unknown' instead of proper month names during navigation.
